reasoning: Focusing on lactate clearance is key to improving your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. The recent ride showed an FTP utilization of just 52%, and this workout will better prepare you for the sustained power demands of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 8x Over-Unders (4 min @ 242W-256W, 2 min @ 201W-218W), focus on smooth transitions

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
